source: Homeowner 's Warranty , which denied coverage , had assured the buyers that all homes insured under its program were inspected on a continuing basis during construction -- a point that was contested at trial . Of the total jury award , $325,000 was for punitive damages intended to deter future wrongdoing . The two sides agreed to settle the case out of court for an undisclosed amount .
domestication: 房主保修公司原本拒绝赔偿，曾经向买家保证，在建造过程中，他们的保险项目下的所有房屋都将持续接受检查——这一点在审判中引发争议。陪审团的判决总金额中，32.5万美元是惩罚性赔偿，目的是警告今后不准再有类似行为。最后，双方同意以未公开的金额在庭外和解此案。
foreignization: 房屋业主保修公司（Homeowner's Warranty）拒绝承担赔偿责任，该公司向购房者保证，在建设过程中，所有参加其计划的房屋都将持续接受检查--这一点在审判期间存在争议。在陪审团裁定的总金额中，325,000美元用于惩罚性赔偿，以阻止未来类似的不法行为。双方同意在庭外和解此案，并且和解金额不对外公开。

source: In February op-ed , Bolton advocated launching a " decidedly disproportionate " " retaliatory cyber campaign " against Russia to teach Moscow that the cost of meddling in US elections will be , he said , " so high that they will simply consign all their cyberwarfare plans to their computer memories to gather electronic dust . "
domestication: 二月份，博尔顿在一篇社论中主张对俄罗斯发起“明显不成比例”的“报复性网络战”，以教训莫斯科不要干预美国大选。他说，俄罗斯要付出极高的代价，一旦他们尝到苦头，就会把所有的网络战计划都束之高阁，让其在电脑里积灰尘。博尔顿的想法是，既然美国的网络安全漏洞百出，那么就应该以其人之道还治其人之身，让俄罗斯也尝尝被黑客入侵的滋味。

source: Although the Freikorps cooperated with Latvian forces in running out the Bolsheviks , it was clear that they intended to return German rule to the Baltics -- if not with Berlin 's support , then in the form of an autonomous German-ruled Baltic state . Besides strictly military activities , the Freikorps also raised funds to support itself and purported to offer the reward of colonial homesteads on Baltic soil to its recruits .
domestication: 尽管自由军团曾与拉脱维亚军队合作将布尔什维克赶出国门，但他们的真实意图是很明显的：他们想让波罗的海地区重新回到德国人的统治之下。如果不能得到柏林的支持，那么他们就会以建立一个自治的德国人统治的波罗的海国家来实现这个目标。在进行严格意义上的军事活动之外，自由军团还为自己筹集经费，并声称会为新招募的成员提供波罗的海土地上殖民式的居所作为奖励。他们的计划很大胆，甚至涉及到让士兵们在当地安家落户，建立新的生活。

Although the Freikorps cooperated with Latvian forces in running out the Bolsheviks , it was clear that they intended to return German rule to the Baltics -- if not with Berlin 's support , then in the form of an autonomous German-ruled Baltic state . Besides strictly military activities , the Freikorps also raised funds to support itself and purported to offer the reward of colonial homesteads on Baltic soil to its recruits .

source: But no one at Niantic really seems to box it up as a mobile gaming company . Making these games is a big part of what the company does , yes , but the games are part of a bigger picture : they are a springboard , a place to figure out the constraints of what they can do with augmented reality today , and to figure out how to build the tech that moves it forward . Niantic wants to wrap their learnings back into a platform upon which others can build their own AR products , be it games or something else . And they want to be ready for whatever comes after smartphones .
domestication: 尼安提克公司并不简单地将自己定位为一家手机游戏公司。制作游戏是他们业务的重要组成部分，但这只是一个更大画面的其中一部分：这些游戏是跳板，是尝试和探索当前增强现实技术能够做什么的场所，也是为了开发能够推动这一领域前进的技术。尼安提克希望将他们的经验整合到一个平台中，让其他公司能够在此基础上开发自己的增强现实产品，无论是游戏还是其他东西。同时，他们也想为智能手机之后的下一个潮流做好准备。
foreignization: 但在Niantic，似乎没有人真正将其定位为一家移动游戏公司。制作这些游戏是这家公司工作的重要组成部分，是的，但这些游戏只是一个更大画面的组成部分：它们是一个起跳点，是一个用来探索他们今天可以使用增强现实做什么的限制的场所，也是用来弄清楚如何开发能推动这一技术向前发展的技术的场所。 Niantic希望将他们的经验融入到一个平台中，以便其他人可以在此基础上构建自己的增强现实产品，无论是游戏还是其他东西。并且他们希望为智能手机之后的时代做好准备。

Niantic wants to wrap their learnings back into a platform upon which others can build their own AR products , be it games or something else . And they want to be ready for whatever comes after smartphones .

Making these games is a big part of what the company does , yes , but the games are part of a bigger picture : they are a springboard , a place to figure out the constraints of what they can do with augmented reality today , and to figure out how to build the tech that moves it forward . source: The marketplace funding model is also valuable , because it allows a single platform to serve more customers ( wider range of risk tolerances among investors ) and grow more quickly ( less capital-intensive model ) , but , ultimately , the technology-enabled distribution and underwriting has been the predominant driving force .  Point-of-sale financing is the biggest opportunity
domestication: 市场化的资金模式很有价值，因为它允许一个平台服务更多的客户（投资者中更广泛的风险承受能力），并且能够更快地增长（资本密集度较低的模式）。但是，最终，技术使能的分销和承保才是推动这一切发展的主要驱动力。销售点融资是最大的机遇。

source: Step into the building , and you immediately see the " after . " Crouched in the corner of the lobby is the sinuous , predatory 1930 Mercedes-Benz " Count Trossi " SSK . Its black paint and chrome gleam . The leather upholstery is immaculate . There are no blemishes on the scalloped aluminum dashboard . The car is as perfect as it was when Count Carlo Felice Trossi , the aristocratic Italian race-car driver , received it from its English coach builders .
domestication: 一踏进大楼，你立刻就会被“后世之作”所吸引。在大厅的角落里，蹲着一辆形状优美、气势逼人的1930年款梅赛德斯-奔驰“特罗西伯爵”SSK跑车。它那黑色的漆面和镀铬的车身在光线下闪闪发光。皮革座椅看起来一尘不染，没有任何瑕疵。波浪形的铝制仪表盘也同样完美无缺。这辆车的状态就跟它刚从英国车身制造商交到意大利贵族赛车手特罗西伯爵卡洛·费利切的手里时一样完美。

source: That did n't end the dream . Aviation enthusiast and Bureau of Air Commerce chief Eugene Vidal ( father of novelist Gore Vidal ) offered government grants to manufacturers of a " poor man 's airplane " -- one that could be had for $700 back in the 1930s . Inventor Waldo Waterman took him up on the offer in 1936 and built a small plane with removable wings , a clutch and a transmission , called the Waterman Arrowbile . It actually flew through the air and rumbled over roads , but did n't fly as well as the average plane nor drive as well as the average car . Waterman never mass-produced the thing and no one has since found a market for an aerial roadster .
domestication: 这并没有终结梦想。航空爱好者、商务航空局局长尤金·维达尔（小说家戈尔·维达尔的父亲）为制造“穷人飞机”的生产商提供政府补助——在20世纪30年代，只需700美元就能拥有一架这样的飞机。发明家沃尔多·沃特曼在1936年接受了他的提议，制造了一架带有可拆卸机翼、离合器和变速器的小型飞机，名为沃特曼箭形汽车。这款车确实可以在空中飞行，在公路上隆隆作响，但它的飞行并不比普通飞机好，驾驶也不如普通汽车好。沃特曼从未大规模生产这款车，如今也没有人找到市场销售这种空中跑车。
foreignization: 这并没有终结梦想。 航空爱好者和航空商务局局长尤金·维达尔（小说家戈尔·维达尔的父亲）向“穷人飞机”的制造商提供了政府补助，这是一种可以在1930年代以700美元购买的飞机。 发明家沃尔多·沃特曼在1936年接受了他的提议，并建造了一架带有可拆卸机翼、离合器和变速箱的飞机，称为沃特曼箭形汽车。 它实际上飞过空中，在道路上隆隆作响，但与普通飞机相比，它的飞行能力不够好，与普通汽车相比，它的驾驶也不够好。 沃特曼从未批量生产这种东西，至今也没有人找到市场来销售这种空中跑车。

That did n't end the dream . Aviation enthusiast and Bureau of Air Commerce chief Eugene Vidal ( father of novelist Gore Vidal ) offered government grants to manufacturers of a " poor man 's airplane " -- one that could be had for $700 back in the 1930s . Inventor Waldo Waterman took him up on the offer in 1936 and built a small plane with removable wings , a clutch and a transmission , called the Waterman Arrowbile . It actually flew through the air and rumbled over roads , but did n't fly as well as the average plane nor drive as well as the average car . Waterman never mass-produced the thing and no one has since found a market for an aerial roadster .

source: This postwar pluralism came under attack in 1956 from C. Wright Mills in The Power Elite . Mills charged that behind the appearance of plurality lay a unified and unaccountable elite . He had a point . Establishment groups were dominated by upper-class Americans with Roman numerals after their names . But the policy elite also included civil rights leaders like the NAACP 's Roy Wilkins and labor officials like the United Auto Workers ' Walter Reuther and was closely linked to more popular civic and political associations .
domestication: 二战后出现的多元主义遭到了质疑。1956年，C·赖特·米尔斯在《权力精英》一书中提出了挑战，认为尽管表面上看起来充满多样性，但实际上却是一个团结且不受制约的精英阶层在操控一切。他的观点有一定的道理，因为主导体制的群体大多由带有罗马数字姓名后缀的上层阶级美国人所掌控。但是，政策精英也包括民权领袖如NAACP的罗伊·威尔金斯，以及劳工官员如沃尔特·鲁瑟，这些人与更广泛的公民和政治组织有着密切的联系。
foreignization: 二战后的多元主义在1956年遭到了C·赖特·米尔斯（C. Wright Mills）在《权力精英》（The Power Elite）一书的攻击。米尔斯指控，在多元化的表象背后，存在着一个团结且不受制约的精英阶层。他有理由这么说。上流社会的团体都是由带有罗马数字姓名的美国上层阶级人士主导的。但政策精英也包括民权领袖，如全国有色人种协进会（NAACP）的罗伊·威尔金斯（Roy Wilkins）和劳工官员，如沃尔特·鲁瑟（Walter Reuther）代表的美国汽车工人联合会，与更广泛的公民和政治组织有密切联系。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

This postwar pluralism came under attack in 1956 from C. Wright Mills in The Power Elite . Mills charged that behind the appearance of plurality lay a unified and unaccountable elite . He had a point . Establishment groups were dominated by upper-class Americans with Roman numerals after their names . But the policy elite also included civil rights leaders like the NAACP 's Roy Wilkins and labor officials like the United Auto Workers ' Walter Reuther and was closely linked to more popular civic and political associations .

He had a point . Establishment groups were dominated by upper-class Americans with Roman numerals after their names . But the policy elite also included civil rights leaders like the NAACP 's Roy Wilkins and labor officials like the United Auto Workers ' Walter Reuther and was closely linked to more popular civic and political associations .

二战后的多元主义在1956年遭到了C·赖特·米尔斯（C. Wright Mills）在《权力精英》（The Power Elite）一书的攻击。米尔斯指控，在多元化的表象背后，存在着一个团结且不受制约的精英阶层。他有理由这么说。上流社会的团体都是由带有罗马数字姓名的美国上层阶级人士主导的。但政策精英也包括民权领袖，如全国有色人种协进会（NAACP）的罗伊·威尔金斯（Roy Wilkins）和劳工官员，如沃尔特·鲁瑟（Walter Reuther）代表的美国汽车工人联合会，与更广泛的公民和政治组织有密切联系。

source: Crow 's singing also projects a natural soulfulness and an effortless fluidity only hinted at on the studio versions of her songs . The same raspy soprano that sounds so playful on the breezy , tongue-in-cheek " All I Wan na Do " assumes a feverish intensity for more urgent numbers like " Leaving Las Vegas " and " Run , Baby , Run . " Crow easily reaches for whiskey highs and sinks to sultry , resonant lows .
domestication: 克罗的现场演唱充满了自然的灵魂感和毫不费力的流畅度，这是她录音室版本的歌曲中仅仅暗示的。那种沙哑的女高音，让人在轻松的调侃歌曲《我只想做》中感到玩味十足，但在更紧迫的歌曲《离开拉斯维加斯》和《跑，宝贝，跑》中，却呈现出了一种狂热的强烈感。克罗轻松地触及到像威士忌般的高潮，又滑向充满诱惑的、共鸣的低音。她的嗓音就像一条河流，流畅自然，带领着人们进入音乐的世界。
foreignization: 克罗的歌声也呈现出一种自然的灵魂感和一种只有在她歌曲的录音室版本中才暗示的毫不费力的流畅度。那个听起来在轻快、调侃的"All I Wanna Do"中如此活泼的沙哑女高音，会为像"Leaving Las Vegas"和"Run, Baby, Run"这样的更紧迫的歌曲呈现出一种热病般的强烈感。克罗轻松地达到如同威士忌般的高潮，并且降低到性感、共鸣的低音。

Crow 's singing also projects a natural soulfulness and an effortless fluidity only hinted at on the studio versions of her songs . The same raspy soprano that sounds so playful on the breezy , tongue-in-cheek " All I Wan na Do " assumes a feverish intensity for more urgent numbers like " Leaving Las Vegas " and " Run , Baby , Run . " Crow easily reaches for whiskey highs and sinks to sultry , resonant lows .
克罗的现场演唱充满了自然的灵魂感和毫不费力的流畅度，这是她录音室版本的歌曲中仅仅暗示的。那种沙哑的女高音，让人在轻松的调侃歌曲《我只想做》中感到玩味十足，但在更紧迫的歌曲《离开拉斯维加斯》和《跑，宝贝，跑》中，却呈现出了一种狂热的强烈感。克罗轻松地触及到像威士忌般的高潮，又滑向充满诱惑的、共鸣的低音。她的嗓音就像一条河流，流畅自然，带领着人们进入音乐的世界。
